---
title: "Majal Initiative: AI Track"
subtitle: "Five days: from linear regression to autonomous agents"
---

## Course Material

| Day | Topic | Status | Slides | Labs |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:------:|------|
| 1 | **AI Foundations & Supervised Learning** | 🚧 In progress | [**Open slides**](slides/day1.qmd) | Lab 0 · Lab 1 · Lab 2 |
| 2 | **Unsupervised Learning** | Coming soon | — | — |
| 3 | **Computer Vision & Deep Learning** | Coming soon | — | — |
| 4 | **NLP → Transformers → LLMs** | Coming soon | — | — |
| 5 | **Agentic AI: RAG → Tools → Agents** | Coming soon | — | — |

: {.striped .hover}

*Day 1 is live and improving day by day. Days 2 through 5 are still being built and will appear here once ready.*

## How to use this

- **Slides** open in your browser, on a laptop or your phone. Some slides are interactive: drag the sliders, type in the boxes.
- **Labs** open in Google Colab. Nothing to install.
- Navigate slides with arrow keys, `F` for fullscreen, `S` for speaker notes, `Esc` for an overview of all slides.

## Requirements

- A Google account (for Colab)
- Days 4 and 5 need an API key: your instructor will give you one
